specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10
  • Processor: Intel 5th gen i5 or AMD Athlon (2015 or newer)
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: nvidia 1070 GTX or AMD Radeon RX5600XT (requires OpenGL 4.1 or higher, min 4GB VRAM). Intel integrated graphics may work, but are not officially supported.
  • Storage: 1170 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Any OpenAL compatible sound card
specification.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10/11
  • Processor: Intel 7th gen i5 or higher or AMD Ryzen
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: nvidia 2070 RTX or AMD Radeon RX5700XT. 8GB VRAM or higher. Intel integrated graphics may work, but are not officially supported.
  • Network: Broadband Internet connection
  • Storage: 1170 MB available space
  • Sound Card: Any OpenAL compatible sound card with surround sound speakers
